members.name: baseZIndex
members.description: The base z-index of the layout. The z-index of the sidebar, header, tab, footer, and their fixed versions will be calculated based on this value.

members.name: fixedTop
members.description: Whether the header and tab are fixed to the top of the layout when the orientation is vertical. If true, the header and tab will be fixed to the top of the layout when the orientation is vertical, and will scroll with the content when the orientation is horizontal.

members.name: stretchFooter
members.description: Whether the footer should stretch to the full width of the layout or the content when layout orientation is vertical.

members.name: open
members.description: The controlled open state of the layout. Can be bound with `v-model`.

members.name: defaultOpen
members.description:
The open state of the layout when it is initially rendered.

Use when you do not need to control its open state.

members.name: collapsedSidebarWidth
members.description: The width of the sidebar when it is collapsed. (px)

members.name: isMobile
members.description: Whether the layout is in mobile view.

members.name: mobileSidebarWidth
members.description: The width of the sidebar in the mobile view. (px)

members.name: fullContent
members.description: whether the content takes the full height of the layout (include).

members.name: pxToRem
members.description: The function to convert pixels to rem.
members.default: (px: number) => px / 16 (16 is the base font size)

members.name: type
members.description: The type of the button element. Can be one of 'button', 'submit', or 'reset'.

members.name: asChild
members.description: Change the default rendered element for the one passed as a child, merging their props and behavior.

members.name: as
members.description: The element or component this component should render as. Can be overwrite by `asChild`

referencedTypes.name: Component
referencedTypes.description:
A type used in public APIs where a component type is expected.
The constructor type is an artificial type returned by defineComponent().
